context: Tests whether the agent reaches for useSyncExternalStore (the correct primitive for browser values that change over time) rather than a useState+useEffect pair, and avoids importing or calling useEffect directly in components or hooks. Also checks that the subscribe function correctly returns a cleanup/unsubscribe function, and that the agent documents its design rationale.

checklist.name: useSyncExternalStore used
checklist.description: The hook implementation calls useSyncExternalStore (imported from 'react') rather than a useState+useEffect pair to track the network status

checklist.name: No direct useEffect import
checklist.description: Neither the hook file (useNetworkStatus) nor the demo component (NetworkBanner) contains an import of useEffect from 'react'

checklist.name: No direct useEffect call
checklist.description: Neither the hook file nor the demo component contains a direct call to useEffect(...) or React.useEffect(...)

checklist.name: Subscribe returns cleanup
checklist.description: The subscribe callback passed to useSyncExternalStore returns a cleanup/unsubscribe function that removes the event listeners (i.e., it calls window.removeEventListener or equivalent)

checklist.name: getSnapshot reads browser value
checklist.description: The getSnapshot argument reads navigator.onLine (or an equivalent live browser value) to return the current network status

checklist.name: Correct subscribe signature
checklist.description: useSyncExternalStore is called with at least two arguments: a subscribe function and a getSnapshot function (correct API usage)

checklist.name: Design rationale documented
checklist.description: README.md contains a written explanation of why the chosen React primitive was used for this problem (mentions useSyncExternalStore or the reason for the approach, not just 'it works')

checklist.name: No prop-copy or state-relay misuse
checklist.description: The hook does NOT copy props into state, relay user actions, or fetch server data — it only subscribes to the browser network event
